benefits.description: When timed correctly (~1 hour before bed), achieves 65% SWS and REM out of total sleep time with very high HRV recoveries

side_effects.description: Face-flushed sensation when dose taken in the middle of the night (woke at midnight and dosed); also difficulty falling back asleep
Hard to fall back asleep when dosed too early (5 hours before bed) or in the middle of the night

protocol_notes: Optimal timing appears to be ~1 hour before bed. Dosing 5 hours before bed showed less noticeable effect. Currently under extreme stress which is overriding sleep benefits.
